# R John Victor Portfolio

> Solutions Engineer portfolio focused on full-stack, platform, cloud, and real-time systems engineering.

## Summary
R John Victor is a Solutions Engineer with 8+ years of experience building enterprise software, cloud-native platforms, and scalable full-stack applications.

- https://www.rjohnvictor.com/
